channel.title: NewsAnarchist
channel.description: Independent journalism. The stories mainstream media won't cover.

item.title: Solid 20Y Auction Stops Through With Above Average Foreign Demand
item.description:
Solid 20Y Auction Stops Through With Above Average Foreign Demand

The week's lone coupon auction priced at 1pm when the Treasury sold $13 BN in 20Y paper, in a solid if not stellar auction.

The auction stopped at a high yield of 4.883%, u

item.title: Another Court Rules Copyright Can’t Stop People From Reading and Speaking the Law
item.description: Another court has ruled that copyright can’t be used to keep our laws behind a paywall. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit upheld a lower court’s ruling that it is fair use to copy and disseminate building codes that have been incorporated into federal and state law, even though
item.content:encoded: <div class="field field--name-body field--type-text-with-summary field--label-hidden"><div class="field__items"><div class="field__item even"><p>Another court has <a href=" title="Third Circuit Opinion in ASTM v Upcodes">ruled</a> that copyright can’t be used to keep our laws behind a paywall. item.dc:creator: NewsAnarchist Desk

item.title: Solar Stocks Surge As Energy Shock Revives Renewables Trade
item.description:
Solar Stocks Surge As Energy Shock Revives Renewables Trade

Goldman analyst Adam Wijaya asked clients whether this year's surge in SolarEdge, Enphase Energy, and other solar stocks is reviving a familiar trade: higher crude oil and natur
